description: Structured semiformal proof system. Author .wit proofs, check structure, build LLM-ready verification contexts, persist receipts. Includes Soc working-memory queue.

bin.description: Run `wit verify` on a file (optional --step N.M)
Read verifier output from stdin and save .receipt.json

iframe_commands.name: open
iframe_commands.description: Load a .wit file in the source view

iframe_commands.name: check
iframe_commands.description: Run wit check on the current file

iframe_commands.name: verify
iframe_commands.description: Run wit verify; with no arg verifies all steps, or pass a label like 3.1

iframe_commands.name: context
iframe_commands.description: Show the isolated verification context for one step

iframe_commands.name: focus
iframe_commands.description: Highlight a step in the proof tree

iframe_commands.name: tab
iframe_commands.description: Switch between Proofs and Soc Memory tabs
